Hydrogen Utilization %
==================================================

.. math::

   \text{}

.. raw:: html

   <table class="kpi-table">
      <tbody>
         <tr>
            <td>Description</td>
            <td><ul><li>Hydrogen Utilization % measures the efficiency of hydrogen usage in a process by comparing the amount of hydrogen consumed to the amount supplied</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Objective</td>
            <td><ul><li>The objective of this KPI is to assess how effectively hydrogen is being utilized in operations</li><li>which can help identify areas for improvement in efficiency and resource management</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Formula</td>
            <td>
               <p>The KPI is calculated by dividing the amount of hydrogen consumed by the amount supplied, then multiplying the result by 100 to express it as a percentage.</p>
               <div class="math-equation">$$ \mathit{Hydrogen\,Utilization\,\%} = \mathit{0))} \times \mathit{100} $$</div>
            </td>
         </tr>

         <tr>
            <td>Generation time</td>
            <td>
               0.0s (AI 0.0s + Render 0.0s)
               <div style="font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; margin-top: 4px;">
                  Total: 0.0s
                  • AI: 0.0s
                  • Render: 0.0s
               </div>
            </td>
         </tr>

         <tr>
            <td>Extraction rate %</td>
            <td>100.0%</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Error rate %</td>
            <td>0.0%</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Used in KPI(s)</td>
            <td><ul><li>This KPI is used in performance assessments related to hydrogen production and consumption</li><li>as well as in sustainability initiatives aimed at reducing waste and optimizing resource use</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Input Measure</td>
            <td><ul><li>The input measures for this KPI are the quantities of hydrogen consumed and supplied</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Unit of Measure</td>
            <td>The unit of measure for Hydrogen Utilization % is percentage.</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Reporting Source</td>
            <td>The reporting source for this KPI is typically operational data collected from hydrogen supply and consumption metrics.</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Comments</td>
            <td>A high Hydrogen Utilization % indicates efficient use of hydrogen, while a low percentage may suggest inefficiencies or losses in the system.</td>
         </tr>
      </tbody>
   </table>

.. admonition:: Code Context
   :class: dropdown

   
   
   

   .. code-block:: sql
      :linenos:
   
      :emphasize-lines: 1
   

      -- KPI: Hydrogen Utilization %
   SELECT (consumed_h2 / NULLIF(supplied_h2,0)) * 100 AS [Hydrogen Utilization %]
   FROM (
     SELECT 760 AS consumed_h2, 800 AS supplied_h2
   ) t;
